results.rendered_html:
adhiṣṭhātṛ [sthā-tṛc] Superintending, watching over, presiding over,
(pb) guiding, governing; tutelary, guardian; as ˚trī devatā a guardian or presiding deity.
— m. (tā) A superintendent, head, chief, protector, controller, regulator, ruler; sarveṃdriyādhiṣṭhātā  Bhāṣā P. ; especially with reference to the Almighty who is the ruler of the universe. See adhideva also.
